tools.name: Cursor Agent CLI
tools.install: Install Cursor Agent CLI from the official Cursor distribution.
tools.upgrade: Upgrade Cursor Agent CLI with the official Cursor updater.

tools.name: Superpowers for Cursor
tools.install: Install the Superpowers plugin from the Cursor marketplace.
tools.upgrade: Update the Superpowers plugin in Cursor.

tools.name: CodeGraph
tools.install: Install CodeGraph and expose the codegraph command to Cursor.
tools.upgrade: Upgrade CodeGraph with its installation package manager.

tools.name: Tokscale
tools.install: Install Tokscale globally with npm install --global tokscale@latest and expose the tokscale command on PATH.
tools.upgrade: Upgrade Tokscale to the latest release with the package manager used to install it.
